author: YourName
install_msg: LunaDoc cog loaded successfully! Use `[p]luna set token <token>` to configure your API token.
description: A comprehensive cog for querying the Luna API documentation. Features include server status, player info, bans, cases, staff list, game data, and crash reports.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data.
name: LunaDoc
